subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1914-03-02 in Haifa
subcodes.first_line: His Holiness the Báb says: 'We have put mankind in the alembic…" These souls are quickened through the Breath of the Blessed Perfection... The Holy, divine Manifestations have appeared in this world to instruct mankind in the school of morality... The foundation of praiseworthy virtues is faith.
subcodes.subjects: @forces of light and darkness; integration and disintegration, @religion as basis of morality; of divine civilization, @mission of the Manifestation of God in the world, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life
